what: Fetch latest changes from vault git remote
why: Get latest knowledge content from team
output: Fetch result with new commits count and remote HEAD reference

success_handling.criteria: git fetch completes successfully and remote refs are updated

error_handling.criteria: git fetch fails with connection refused, timeout, or DNS resolution error
error_handling.action: Abort pull, suggest user check network connectivity and retry

error_handling.criteria: git fetch fails with HTTP 401/403 or SSH authentication error
error_handling.action: Abort pull, prompt user to refresh credentials

decisions.condition: Fetch succeeds with no new commits
decisions.outcome: Skip remaining steps, vault is up to date
